szellem.cim: Magical Spirit Training (I) — Thought Control, Discipline, and Mastery
szellem.leiras: The first step: sit comfortably or lie down, relax your body, close your eyes, and for 5 minutes observe the flow of your thoughts as a passive observer. Each day extend by 1 minute until you can sustain 10 minutes. This is to be done morning and evening. The goal: complete thought emptiness for 10 minutes.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Twice daily for 5–10 minutes: observe the flow of your thoughts as a passive observer without judging them.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you passively observe your thoughts for 10 minutes without the slightest judgment, twice daily in succession?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Consciously dismiss certain thoughts; retain one thought of your own choosing; cultivate thought emptiness.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you hold a single chosen thought uninterrupted for 10 minutes?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Keep a magic journal: record every success, failure, and the duration of your practices. Self-criticism and planning for the next day/week.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you regularly keep your magic journal and objectively assess your progress each day?

lelek.cim: Magical Soul Training (I) — Introspection or Self-Knowledge
lelek.leiras: Self-knowledge is a prerequisite of every initiatory method. Record in your journal all the dark sides of your soul: your faults, habits, and passions. Be strict with yourself. Assign every fault to one of the four elements (Fire, Water, Air, Earth) in three degrees of strength.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Devote a few minutes morning and evening to self-criticism: discover the faults, habits, and weaknesses of your soul. Write them down.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you recognize new patterns and traits in yourself daily through self-knowledge reflection?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Assign your faults to the four elements in three degrees of strength. FIRE: irritability, jealousy, anger. AIR: frivolity, vanity, gossip. WATER: indifference, negligence, stubbornness. EARTH: touchiness, laziness, heaviness.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you completed the black mirror: recorded every known fault, assigned them to elements, and ranked them in three degrees of strength?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Assign your good qualities to the elements as well. FIRE: initiative, enthusiasm, courage. AIR: diligence, joy, kindness. WATER: modesty, calm, gentleness. EARTH: perseverance, precision, sense of responsibility.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you completed the white mirror: recorded your virtues and assigned them to elements?

test.cim: Magical Body Training (I) — The Material Body, Breathing, Eating, Water
test.leiras: Body, soul, and spirit are to be trained simultaneously. Morning body care, morning exercise, conscious breathing, conscious eating, the magic of water.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Each morning brush your entire body with a soft brush (the skin should turn slightly pink). Then rinse with cold water and rub dry. A lifelong daily habit.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you perform morning body care (brushing + cold water) daily without interruption?

gyakorlatok.leiras: A few minutes of morning exercise daily; goal: a supple, flexible body.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you perform morning exercise daily?

gyakorlatok.leiras: While breathing, vividly imagine health, calm, and success flowing into every part of your body. Begin with 7 breaths morning and evening, increasing by 1 each day. Never exceed half an hour.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you perform the conscious breathing exercise morning and evening daily, and vividly feel the flow of energy?

gyakorlatok.cim: Conscious Eating (the mystery of the Eucharist)
gyakorlatok.leiras: Focus your wish over food or drink as though it has already been fulfilled. Eat slowly and consciously; do not read or distract yourself. Always use the same wish for both breathing and eating.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: At every meal do you consciously focus on your wish and eat slowly and mindfully?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Each time you wash your hands, imagine that along with physical dirt your spiritual burdens, failures, and restlessness are washed away. Pour out the dirty water immediately. Conversely: you may charge bath water with a wish so that its power passes into your body.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you consciously apply the magic of water at every handwashing and bathing?

osszefoglalo: Thought control and mastery, completion of the soul mirror (black and white), daily body care, and mastery of conscious breathing + eating + the magic of water.

szellem.cim: Magical Spirit Training (II) — Autosuggestion and Concentration Exercises
szellem.leiras: Learning the secret of the subconscious mind and mastering autosuggestion. Concentration exercises for the five senses.

gyakorlatok.cim: Autosuggestion — the Secret of the Subconscious
gyakorlatok.leiras: At the moment before falling asleep (when the gate to the subconscious is open), preserve your strongest wish and finest thoughts, and carry them into sleep.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you consistently apply your chosen wish/formula before sleep and upon waking?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Visualize an object, person, or landscape in as much detail as possible. Hold it for 10 minutes.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you hold a visual image undisturbed for 5 minutes in your inner sight?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Recall a sound, music, or word through inner hearing. Maintain it without external distraction.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you recall a sound undisturbed for 5 minutes through inner hearing?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Imagine the precise sensation of touching an object or material. E.g. wood, metal, the warmth/cold of water.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you recall a tactile or temperature sensation undisturbed for 5 minutes?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Recall the precise sensation of a scent through inner smell (flower, grass, bread, etc.).
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you recall a scent undisturbed for 5 minutes through inner smell?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Recall the precise sensation of a taste through inner taste (sweet, sour, salty, bitter).
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you recall a taste undisturbed for 5 minutes through inner taste?

lelek.cim: Magical Soul Training (II) — Astral-Magical Balance and Character Refinement
lelek.leiras: Restoring balance among the elements: overcoming faults, self-suggestion, transmutation.

gyakorlatok.leiras: From the black mirror of the first grade, select your strongest faults. Each day work on restraining them with strong will.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you consistently work on overcoming the strongest faults from the black mirror, and experience measurable improvement in your daily behavior?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Suggest into yourself the virtuous quality opposite to the fault, before sleep and upon waking.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you consistently suggest the opposite virtuous quality into yourself before sleep and upon waking?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Transform the fault into the opposite quality: e.g. irritability into energy, touchiness into understanding.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you immediately turn a negative impulse in a positive direction in daily life?

test.cim: Magical Body Training (II) — Conscious Pore Breathing, Posture
test.leiras: Conscious breathing through the skin and daily development of mastery over the body.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Imagine that you breathe in life energy from the cosmos not only through your lungs but through your entire skin surface. Feel how this energy spreads throughout your body.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you evoke a vivid and real sensation of breathing through your entire skin surface?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Each day pay attention to your bodily state; sit, stand, and walk with discipline and uprightness.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you daily observe and consciously correct your posture?

gyakorlatok.cim: Mastery of the Body in Daily Life
gyakorlatok.leiras: Develop the ability to direct the body at will; consciously influence fatigue, cold sensations, and muscle movements.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you consciously influence and reduce fatigue, cold sensations, or muscle tension?

osszefoglalo: Autosuggestion, concentration exercises for the five senses, character refinement (overcoming, self-suggestion, transmutation), conscious pore breathing and posture.

szellem.cim: Magical Spirit Training (III) — Thought Concentration with Two and Three Senses
szellem.leiras: Concentration with two or three senses simultaneously, then on objects, landscapes, animals, and persons.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Combine, for example, the imagined experience of sight and hearing, or sight + hearing + touch simultaneously.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you hold two or three sensory experiences combined simultaneously in inner concentration?

gyakorlatok.cim: Thought concentration on objects, landscapes, rooms
gyakorlatok.leiras: Recall a familiar object, room, or place in as much detail as possible with all senses.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you recall an object, room, or place in detail and stably with all senses?

gyakorlatok.cim: Thought concentration on animals and people
gyakorlatok.leiras: Recall an animal or person in their full being; their movements, sounds, and essence.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you recall an animal or person in their full being, with their movement and essence?

lelek.cim: Magical Soul Training (III) — Element Breathing in the Whole Body
lelek.leiras: Conscious inhalation of the four elements into the whole body, together with the quality of each element.

gyakorlatok.leiras: While breathing, imagine inhaling the FIRE element; warm, glowing energy fills your entire body. Body-guarding, warming, activating.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you evoke the genuine sensation of warmth of the FIRE element throughout the whole body while breathing?

gyakorlatok.leiras: While breathing, imagine inhaling the AIR element; lightness and a sense of freedom fill the body.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you evoke the sensation of lightness of the AIR element throughout the whole body while breathing?

gyakorlatok.leiras: While breathing, imagine inhaling the WATER element; cool, flowing energy fills your body and brings calm.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you evoke the cooling, flowing sensation of the WATER element throughout the whole body while breathing?

gyakorlatok.leiras: While breathing, imagine inhaling the EARTH element; heaviness, solidity, and stability fill you.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you evoke the sensation of heaviness and solidity of the EARTH element throughout the whole body while breathing?

test.cim: Magical Body Training (III) — Vital Energy Accumulation, Space Impregnation, Biomagnetism
test.leiras: Conscious gathering of vital energy in the body, charging a space, magnetism.

gyakorlatok.cim: Vital energy accumulation in the whole body
gyakorlatok.leiras: Accumulate life energy throughout the whole body through lung and pore breathing. Feel its warmth and density.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you gather life energy throughout your whole body and vividly feel its warmth and density?

gyakorlatok.cim: Vital energy accumulation in individual body parts
gyakorlatok.leiras: Concentrate and accumulate life energy, e.g. in your hand, head, or around your heart.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you consciously concentrate life energy into individual body parts and feel warmth or tingling there?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Fill an entire room with a positive wish (health, success, peace) through attention turned toward the Akasha principle.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you performed the space impregnation exercise and felt the energetic change in the room?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Apply the magnetic force flowing from your hand to heal and charge people and objects.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you understood the principle of biomagnetism and conducted experiments with the conscious application of the force flowing from your hand?

osszefoglalo: Multi-sensory thought concentration, element breathing (Fire/Water/Air/Earth in the whole body), vital energy accumulation, space impregnation, biomagnetism.

szellem.cim: Magical Spirit Training (IV) — Consciousness Projection into Objects, Animals, and People
szellem.leiras: The deliberate transfer of consciousness into other beings/objects for an inner perspective.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Place your consciousness into a familiar object (e.g. chair, table); perceive its structure and weight from within.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you place your consciousness into an object and perceive its structure and weight from within?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Place your consciousness into an animal's body; feel its movements and the functioning of its senses.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you place your consciousness into an animal's body and feel its movements and sensory experiences from within?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Place your consciousness into a person's body/mind; this develops deep empathy and intuition.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you place your consciousness into a person's mind/body and empathetically perceive their inner state?

lelek.cim: Magical Soul Training (IV) — Element Accumulation and Element Harmony
lelek.leiras: Accumulating the elements in the whole body and in body regions, then restoring element harmony.

gyakorlatok.cim: Element accumulation in the whole body
gyakorlatok.leiras: Accumulate a single element into the whole body, then dissolve it. Each element separately.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you accumulate any element into your whole body and then completely dissolve it?

gyakorlatok.cim: Element accumulation in individual body parts
gyakorlatok.leiras: Accumulate an element into a specific body part (e.g. FIRE → into the head), then dissolve it. By two methods: through the lungs and through pore breathing.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you accumulate an element into a specific body part (e.g. FIRE into the head) by both methods, then completely dissolve it?

gyakorlatok.cim: Restoring element harmony in body regions
gyakorlatok.leiras: FIRE → head, AIR → chest, WATER → abdomen, EARTH → coccyx/legs. Each element has its own bodily region.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you direct each element to the appropriate body region and consciously restore the harmony of the elements?

test.cim: Magical Body Training (IV) — Rituals and Gestures
test.leiras: Gestures, postures, and finger positions as ritual tools.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Learn symbolic gestures that you may use to reinforce the elements, will, and intention.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you mastered several basic symbolic gestures and consciously apply them to reinforce your magical work?

gyakorlatok.leiras: How certain postures (e.g. sitting, standing, lying down) can strengthen magical work.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you performed magical work in different postures and experienced their differing effects?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Certain finger positions strengthen electric/magnetic currents in connection with specific elements.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you practice different finger positions and feel their effect on energy flow?

osszefoglalo: Consciousness projection into objects/animals/people, element accumulation and element harmony in body regions, rituals and gestures.

szellem.leiras: Transferring consciousness into the center of any form, from the atom to the infinite. Experiencing the fourth dimension — spacelessness and timelessness.

gyakorlatok.cim: Transferring consciousness into the center of objects
gyakorlatok.leiras: Choose an object, then imagine placing your consciousness into its geometric center. From there observe its balance.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you place your consciousness into the geometric center of an object and observe it from there?

gyakorlatok.cim: Expanding consciousness to the infinite and contracting it to an atom
gyakorlatok.leiras: Expand your consciousness into the infinite, then contract it to a point the size of an atom. Continue until it becomes natural.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you expand your consciousness into the infinite, then contract it to a single point, with the experience stable and repeatable?

lelek.cim: Magical Soul Training (V) — Element Outpouring Outward
lelek.leiras: The energy gathered through element breathing can be outpoured outward from the body, and later also without the body.

gyakorlatok.cim: Element outpouring outward — through the solar plexus
gyakorlatok.leiras: Channel the element accumulated in the body outward into the air through the solar plexus chakra.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you channel an element outward through the solar plexus and feel the effect of the outpoured energy?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Channel the element gathered in your hand outward through the fingertips with special dynamics.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you channel the element outward from hand/fingers and direct its effect onto an external object or person?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Directly from the air, without mediation through the body, charge a space with the desired element.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you outpour the element directly into the air without direct participation of the body?

test.cim: Magical Body Training (V) — Passive Contact with the Invisible
test.leiras: Preparation and realization: contact with one's own guardian spirit and the deceased.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Neutralize the hand, especially the fingers, from all external influences so that they perceive only spiritual stimuli.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Has your hand become neutral to everyday influences and does it perceive fine spiritual impulses?

gyakorlatok.cim: Preparing the fingers with pendulum, pencil, and circle board
gyakorlatok.leiras: With the help of a pendulum and pencil, develop the sensitivity of the fingers to spiritual impulses.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Does the pendulum or pencil move in your hand under the influence of your will and inner impulses, reliably?

gyakorlatok.cim: Passive contact with one's own guardian spirit
gyakorlatok.leiras: In a meditative state receive signs and messages from your own inner guardian spirit/Higher Self.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: In a meditative state have you successfully contacted your inner guardian spirit/Higher Self and received signs and messages?

gyakorlatok.cim: Passive contact with the deceased and other beings
gyakorlatok.leiras: Develop passive medium-like sensitivity; through the movement of the pendulum or pencil.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: In a passive medium-like state have you received perceptible signals, and do you experience them under controlled conditions?

osszefoglalo: Space magic (consciousness transfer), element outpouring outward, passive contact with the invisible (guardian spirit, deceased).

szellem.cim: Magical Spirit Training (VI) — Focus on One's Own Spirit, Consciousness of the Senses
szellem.leiras: Consciousness of the spirit (mental body) and raising the senses to the spiritual level.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Meditate on your own spirit as the interplay of the four elements: FIRE→will, WATER→feeling, AIR→intellect, EARTH→consciousness.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you consciously distinguish the four elements of your own spirit (will/feeling/intellect/consciousness) and behold them as a unity?

gyakorlatok.cim: Consciousness of the senses on the spiritual level
gyakorlatok.leiras: Raise every sense organ (sight, hearing, etc.) to the spiritual level; perceive spiritually as well, not only physically.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you consciously raise all your sense organs to the spiritual level, beyond physical perception?

lelek.cim: Magical Soul Training (VI) — Mastery of the Akasha Principle
lelek.leiras: Learning and applying the fifth element, the Akasha principle: trance state and mastery of the elements.

gyakorlatok.cim: Preparation for mastery of the Akasha principle
gyakorlatok.leiras: Deep meditation on the Akasha principle: the cause of all things, the primordial principle of spacelessness and timelessness.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you meditatively experience the essence of the Akasha principle (spacelessness/timelessness, cause of all things)?

gyakorlatok.cim: Consciously inducing a trance state through the Akasha
gyakorlatok.leiras: With the help of the Akasha principle enter deep trance while retaining full self-awareness.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you consciously enter deep trance with the help of the Akasha principle and retain full self-awareness?

gyakorlatok.cim: Mastery of an element through individual ritual from the Akasha
gyakorlatok.leiras: From the neutral state of the Akasha evoke any element with ritual intention.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: From the neutral state of the Akasha can you ritually evoke and master any element?

test.cim: Magical Body Training (VI) — Elementals, Larvae, Schemas, Phantoms
test.leiras: Conscious creation of spiritual beings and forms.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Create elemental beings (fire-, water-, air-, earth-elementals) with intention, assign them a task, then dissolve them.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you created elementals, assigned them tasks, and successfully dissolved them when their work was done?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Create thought-beings that fulfill a defined purpose and work automatically, then dissolve them when they have done their work.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you created and successfully dissolved thought-beings (larvae)?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Create magical units on the astral plane that carry out programmed action.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you created and operated astral schemas?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Create magical beings endowed with a spark of life that may also assume material appearance, from the Akasha.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you successfully created phantoms from the Akasha and experienced their material appearance under controlled conditions?

osszefoglalo: Consciousness of one's own spirit, mastery of the Akasha principle (trance state, element ritual), creation of elementals/larvae/schemas/phantoms.

szellem.cim: Magical Spirit Training (VII) — Analysis of the Spirit in Relation to Practice
szellem.leiras: Detailed analysis and application of the four elements of the spirit, including the mutual transformation of light and the FIRE element.

gyakorlatok.cim: Analysis of the elements of the spirit
gyakorlatok.leiras: Deepen the role of each element (FIRE/Air/WATER/EARTH) in the spirit: will, intellect, feeling, consciousness.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you analyzed and described in detail the role of each element in your own spirit, and do these insights deepen your magical practice?

lelek.cim: Magical Soul Training (VII) — Development of Astral Senses
lelek.leiras: Development of astral clairvoyance, clairaudience, and clairsentience with the help of elements and fluidic condensers.

gyakorlatok.leiras: With the help of a fluidic condenser develop astral sight; first perceive static images, then movement.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you regularly and reliably perceive astral images, movement, and energies in your inner sight?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Astral hearing: perceiving sounds and words without a physical source, under controlled conditions.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Under controlled conditions do you regularly perceive astral sounds and words without a physical source?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Astral touch and perception: empathetic detection of others' feelings and physical condition.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you empathetically and reliably perceive others' feelings and physical condition on the astral plane?

test.cim: Magical Body Training (VII) — Four Methods of Creating Elementals, Magical Animation of Images
test.leiras: Advanced creative techniques for elementals and animating images.

gyakorlatok.leiras: 1. Thought creation. 2. Shaping astral matter. 3. Creation from electric/magnetic fluid. 4. Direct creation from the Akasha principle.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you created elementals by all four methods and experienced their differing qualities?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Charge a painting, statue, or mental image with life to such a degree that it is capable of acting independently.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you successfully animated an image or statue and observed independent, observable activity?

osszefoglalo: Analysis of the spirit, astral clairvoyance/clairaudience/clairsentience, elementals by four methods, animation of images.

szellem.leiras: Separation of the mental body from the material body and conscious mental travel to various places.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Relaxation, breathing, and the gradual development of the sensation of consciousness separating.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you regularly reach the preparatory state of deep relaxation and consciousness separation?

gyakorlatok.leiras: First wander mentally in your own room; observe yourself from outside and the familiar objects.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you successfully wandered mentally in your own room and observed yourself and the objects from outside?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Extend mental travel to short familiar routes and streets.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you successfully wandered mentally along familiar routes and partially verified your observations?

gyakorlatok.cim: Mental visits to acquaintances and relatives
gyakorlatok.leiras: Visit familiar persons mentally and verify your observations physically as well.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you successfully verified part of the observations gained during mental visits physically?

lelek.cim: Magical Soul Training (VIII) — The Great 'NOW', Mastery of Fluids
lelek.leiras: Experiencing Akasha-like timelessness, mastery of electric and magnetic fluid.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Immerse yourself completely in the present moment; past and future disappear, only the 'now' exists.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you daily experience moments of timelessness, and has presence in the 'now' become natural?

gyakorlatok.cim: Let us not cling to the past
gyakorlatok.leiras: Consciously release past events and grievances; the magician does not carry unnecessary burdens.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you regularly perform the practice of release and feel inner liberation from the burdens of the past?

gyakorlatok.cim: Mastery of electric fluid (inductive and deductive method)
gyakorlatok.leiras: Electric fluid: the active, expansive aspect of the FIRE element. Induction: gathering from outside. Deduction: outpouring from one's own body.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: With both methods (inductive and deductive) do you successfully master electric fluid and test its effect on other beings?

gyakorlatok.cim: Mastery of magnetic fluid (inductive and deductive method)
gyakorlatok.leiras: Magnetic fluid: the passive, attractive aspect of the WATER element. Applicable in healing and attraction.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: With both methods do you successfully master magnetic fluid and try its healing/attractive applications?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Combination of the two fluids: the fundamental force of creation in the universe. The strongest magical tool.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you successfully combined the two fluids into an electromagnetic unity and consciously apply its creative power?

test.cim: Magical Body Training (VIII) — Influence through the Elements, Fluidic Condensers, Magic Mirror
test.leiras: Making magical objects and the influencing power of the elements.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Fire: burning (destruction of negative effects). Air: evaporation. Water: mixing. Earth: rotting — all magical methods for dissolving problems.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you performed all four methods (burning, evaporation, mixing, rotting) and experienced their effects?

gyakorlatok.cim: Preparation of a simple fluidic condenser
gyakorlatok.leiras: Preparation of a plant infusion (e.g. chamomile) as a fluidic condenser that stores electromagnetic force.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you prepared the simple fluidic condenser and understood and applied the principle of electromagnetic charging?

gyakorlatok.cim: Preparation of a compound fluidic condenser
gyakorlatok.leiras: Preparation of a compound condenser containing gold and silver.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you prepared the compound fluidic condenser using gold and silver?

gyakorlatok.cim: Making a magic mirror with fluidic condenser
gyakorlatok.leiras: Charging a glass disc or mirror with fluidic condenser and one's own electromagnetic fluid.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you made the magic mirror, charged it with condenser and your own fluid, and begun to feel its activity?

osszefoglalo: Mental wandering, the great 'NOW', mastery of electromagnetic fluids, influence through the elements, fluidic condensers and making a magic mirror.

szellem.cim: Magical Spirit Training (IX) — Clairvoyance with Magic Mirrors
szellem.leiras: The magic mirror as the principal tool for extending the senses across time and space.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Charge the magic mirror with electromagnetic fluid and your own astral energy; give it intention and purpose.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you regularly and effectively charge your mirror, and does it perceptibly respond to your will?

gyakorlatok.cim: Magic mirror as a remote-viewing tool (space/time)
gyakorlatok.leiras: Through the mirror see into the distance, explore past/present/future.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: In the mirror do you reliably see distant, past, and future images that you can partially verify?

gyakorlatok.cim: Magic mirror as an influencing tool
gyakorlatok.leiras: Through the mirror radiate positive energy and power onto the sick and into situations.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you successfully apply the mirror to radiate positive energies and experience measurable effects?

gyakorlatok.leiras: Communication with living persons and other beings through the mirror.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you successfully communicated through the mirror and been able to verify part of the messages from an external source?

gyakorlatok.cim: Magic mirror as a protective tool
gyakorlatok.leiras: Turn back harmful and unwanted influences with the mirror.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you successfully apply the mirror for protection and experience the reversal of unwanted effects?

lelek.cim: Magical Soul Training (IX) — Separation of the Astral Body, Divine Primary Qualities
lelek.leiras: Conscious separation of the astral body from the physical body and charging it with four divine primary qualities.

gyakorlatok.cim: Conscious separation of the astral body from the material body
gyakorlatok.leiras: The astral body — the soul's bodily appendage — leaves the physical body with full self-awareness and by will, and returns.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Can you consciously and voluntarily separate your astral body and return it, with full self-awareness?

gyakorlatok.cim: Charging the astral body with four divine primary qualities
gyakorlatok.leiras: Imbue the astral body with divine Love, Wisdom, Will/Power, and Consciousness.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you successfully charged your astral body with all four divine primary qualities and do you maintain this constantly?

test.cim: Magical Body Training (IX) — Healing, Talismans, Wish Fulfillment
test.leiras: Healing with electromagnetic fluid, charging talismans and amulets, wish fulfillment in the Akasha.

gyakorlatok.leiras: Healing sick persons by laying on of hands or from a distance by channeling electromagnetic fluid.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you successfully treated persons with electromagnetic fluid and experienced measurable improvement?

gyakorlatok.cim: Magical charging of talismans, amulets, and gemstones (10 methods)
gyakorlatok.leiras: 10 different methods for charging objects with electromagnetic/astral energy with a defined intention.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you performed talisman charging with all 10 methods, and is the effect of the charged objects perceptible?

gyakorlatok.cim: Wish fulfillment in the Akasha with electromagnetic charging ('Voltozation')
gyakorlatok.leiras: You place the wish, enclosed in an electromagnetic sphere, onto the Akasha plane, where it automatically strives toward fulfillment.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Have you performed the voltozation technique, and do wishes fulfill without your actively thinking of them?

osszefoglalo: Clairvoyance with magic mirrors, separation of the astral body, healing with fluid, charging talismans by 10 methods, wish fulfillment in the Akasha.

szellem.cim: Magical Spirit Training (X) — Raising the Spirit to the Higher Planes
szellem.leiras: Conscious raising of the mental body to the mental planes above the physical and astral planes, and then even higher.

gyakorlatok.cim: Raising the spirit to the higher planes
gyakorlatok.leiras: Deliberate transfer of consciousness to the mental plane, then to the planes beyond it. The physical world temporarily disappears completely.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you consciously raise your spirit to the mental plane and from there to the higher planes, with the physical world disappearing completely?

lelek.cim: Magical Soul Training (X) — Contact with the Personal God and Deities
lelek.leiras: The highest level of soul contact: conscious communion with one's own personal deity and other spiritual hierarchies.

gyakorlatok.cim: Conscious contact with one's own personal God
gyakorlatok.leiras: Conscious, direct, two-way communication with one's own inner divine spark and Higher Self.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: Do you regularly and reliably communicate two-way with your own inner divine spark/Higher Self?

gyakorlatok.cim: Contact with deities and spiritual hierarchies
gyakorlatok.leiras: The magician is able on the Akasha plane to communicate and cooperate with deities, archangels, and other spiritual beings.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: On the Akasha plane have you successfully contacted deities or spiritual hierarchies, and is the cooperation fruitful?

test.cim: Magical Body Training (X) — Various Methods of Magical Abilities
test.leiras: Synthesis of all previous grades; the magician is able to evoke all the phenomena described according to universal laws.

gyakorlatok.cim: Various methods for attaining magical abilities
gyakorlatok.leiras: Influencing weather, healing, harmonizing the living space, communication with the dead, and other higher magical works.
gyakorlatok.successCriteria: As the synthesis of all previous grades, are you able to deliberately evoke the magical phenomena described in the book?

osszefoglalo: Raising the spirit to the higher planes, conscious contact with the personal God and deities, synthesis of all magical abilities.
